description: A young man stands on a rocky, sandy cliff overlooking a turbulent blue ocean. The man is wearing a dark t-shirt, light denim shorts, a black belt, and athletic shoes. He has a white baseball cap on backwards and is looking towards the camera with a slight smile. The background features dramatic waves crashing against rocky outcrops and the vast expanse of the deep blue sea under a clear sky. The foreground consists of textured, light-colored rock formations and sand, suggesting a coastal environment.
location_context: The visual cues of rugged cliffs, turquoise water, and a bright, sunny sky strongly suggest a Mediterranean coastal location, possibly an island, given the type of rock formations and the clear, deep blue of the sea.
time_context: Midday, indicated by the bright sunlight and distinct shadows.
